description: Align the level-generation contract across gsnake-levels, Rust/WASM, and gsnake-web so generated default levels always include valid totalFood data, startup on / works reliably, and regressions are blocked by E2E coverage.

userStories.title: Generate schema-compliant levels with totalFood
userStories.description: As a game runtime consumer, I want generated levels to always include totalFood so startup validation succeeds across web and WASM consumers.
acceptanceCriteria: gsnake-levels generator outputs totalFood for every generated level in gsnake-core/engine/core/data/levels.json
When source totalFood is missing, generator computes totalFood as food.length + floatingFood.length + fallingFood.length
Generated output remains valid against contracts/level-definition.schema.json
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Preserve explicit totalFood while migrating old level sources
userStories.description: As a level author, I want old source definitions without totalFood to be updated automatically while preserving explicit values when already defined.
acceptanceCriteria: Generator keeps explicit source totalFood values unchanged
Generator auto-derives totalFood only for sources that omit the field
Legacy level sources without totalFood are updated as part of generation or migration workflow
Generator tests cover explicit and missing totalFood paths
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Synchronize WASM embedded levels after generation updates
userStories.description: As a web player user, I want embedded default levels in WASM to match regenerated levels so startup behavior is deterministic.
acceptanceCriteria: Workflow rebuilds WASM artifacts after generated levels update
gsnake-core/engine/bindings/wasm/pkg artifacts reflect regenerated level data
No manual patching of generated levels.json is required
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add root-load E2E guard for startup initialization errors
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I want an E2E test that validates root startup does not show initialization failure so this regression is caught in CI.
acceptanceCriteria: E2E suite includes a test that visits / and waits for playable game readiness using deterministic checks
Test asserts startup error UI is absent, including text Level Load Failed
Test asserts startup error UI is absent, including text Failed to initialize game engine. Please reload and try again.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
